content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Vasiliy's Multiset". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/706/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the multiset. The second line contains n space-separated integers, representing the elements of the multiset.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of pairs that can be formed.

solution.approach: Count the frequency of each element and calculate the maximum number of pairs that can be formed for each element.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
freq = [0] * 1001
for _ in range(n):
    x = int(input())
    freq[x] += 1
pairs = sum(x // 2 for x in freq)
print(pairs)
